stories.title: How did Delmon Young turn into 71 WAR and counting...
stories.summary: With the 2026 trade deadline looming, let's delve into some of MLB's most prominent trade trees.

stories.title: FIFA to investigate players clash after WC final
stories.summary: FIFA has opened a disciplinary investigation into the ugly scenes that marred the end of Sunday's World Cup final when players and coaches of Argentina and Spain clashed on the field.

stories.title: Sources: Messi on hiatus for next 2 Miami games
stories.summary: Lionel Messi and Rodrigo De Paul will take some time before rejoining Inter Miami CF for the MLS season following their participation in the FIFA World Cup with Argentina, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Michigan AD Manuel to step down at end of year
stories.summary: Warde Manuel will step down as Michigan AD at the end of the calendar year, the school announced as part of the conclusion of an investigation into the culture of athletics at the university.

stories.title: Stein says Kentucky will win big 'because of me'
stories.summary: Kentucky coach Will Stein says he has the right blueprint to win and that the Wildcats will have success "because of me."
